weather-remote.description: Remote MCP Weather Server via Simple SSE Transport

notes.usage: For remote Cline connections to MCP Weather Server
notes.requirement: Server must be running with MCP_TRANSPORT=sse
notes.port: Default SSE port is 8081, configurable via MCP_SSE_PORT
notes.production: Replace localhost with your server's IP or domain

_configuration_guide.1_start_server: Run 'npm run sse' or 'MCP_TRANSPORT=sse npm run dev' on the server
_configuration_guide.2_update_url: Change 'localhost' to your server's IP address or domain
_configuration_guide.3_copy_to_cline: Copy this configuration to your Cline MCP settings
_configuration_guide.4_test_connection: Ask Cline: 'What's the weather in London?'

5_troubleshooting.timeout_errors: Increase timeout value or check network latency
5_troubleshooting.cors_issues: Server automatically handles CORS for all origins
